payload.title: Resume TNF Phase 7 tight-loop batch 001
payload.description: Execute the Turn Zero Mandate, read docs/protocols/reports/TNF_PHASE7_DIRECTIVE_CONVERSION_LATEST.md and data/ingestion-runs/ai5-phase7-tight-loop-batch-001.json, then convert the claimed Phase 7 directives into verified work with evidence. Update directive states only with evidence artifacts before marking verified or landed. Regenerate the Phase 7 ledger after each completed batch.
verification: docs/protocols/reports/TNF_PHASE7_DIRECTIVE_CONVERSION_LATEST.json summary reflects the new conversion state
constraints: Do not mark a directive verified or landed without concrete file, command, log, or test evidence.
Do not create legacy task_plan.md/findings.md/progress.md unless explicitly requested.
Use TNF-native relay and persisted artifacts before raw terminal injection.
